title: Wano’s Long Night Begins to Break
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Orochi, Unknown person #9, Hiyori as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The water of Zou shall save everyone!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Where did this water come from?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...to have endured this for so many moons....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What kind of world do you wish to make?!
